qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_tipohora as ID, t.c_tipohora as CODE, t.d_tipohora as TEXT, t.n_coeficiente_fc, SEC.policy FROM TTA01_TIPOHORAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Tipos_Horas.TIPOHORA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_tipohora LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_tipohora={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_tipohora as ID, t.c_tipohora as CODE, t.d_tipohora as TEXT, t.n_coeficiente_fc, SEC.policy FROM TTA01_TIPOHORAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Tipos_Horas.TIPOHORA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_tipohora LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_tipohora={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_tipohora as ID, t.c_tipohora as CODE, t.d_tipohora as TEXT, t.n_coeficiente_fc, SEC.policy FROM TTA01_TIPOHORAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Tipos_Horas.TIPOHORA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_tipohora LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW
